brand.name: MARÁN Atelier
brand.description: High-end renovation and bespoke landscape design for Dubai's affluent market.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-background_dark
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-background_dark

layouts.global: Generous spacing scale (e.g. py-24 or py-32 for sections). Mobile-first responsive grids.
layouts.hero: Full-screen (min-h-screen). Absolute positioning for video/image background with black/30 overlay. Split bold typography layout. Floating glassmorphic header at top.
layouts.services: Bento-grid approach. Use CSS Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2. Large gaps (gap-8 or gap-12). Generous internal padding.
layouts.portfolio: Filterable grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Integrate a distinct Before/After slider component prominently.
layouts.contact: Two-column bento style on desktop: Left column for form, right column for a stylized dark-mode map and Dubai contact details. gap-12.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (or bg-background_dark/70 for dark panels). 1px border of white/20 or black/5.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffused drop shadows for hovering: shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)]
visual_enhancers.3d_hover: On services cards, apply transform perspective (`perspective: 1000px`) and calculate rotateX/rotateY based on mouse move event. Smooth transition on mouse leave.

components.name: StickyHeader
components.instructions: Sticky at top with z-50. Glassmorphic styling (never fully transparent if scrolling). Minimalist MARÁN logo left, smooth-scroll anchor links center, Floating 'Book Consultation' CTA right. Fluid hamburger menu for mobile.

components.name: HeroSection
components.instructions: Full viewport height. Background slider using AnimatePresence. Split typography: 'Redefining' / 'Dubai's Luxury Living spaces'.

components.name: ServicesCards
components.instructions: 3D-Hover functionality on 'Premium House Renovation' and 'Bespoke Landscape Design' cards. Use framer-motion for interactive tilt.

components.name: PortfolioGallery
components.instructions: State for active filter (All, Renovation, Landscape). Grid layout. Incorporate a Before/After image slider component (can use a range input overlay to adjust a clip-path for revealing the after image).

components.name: StatsSection
components.instructions: Framer Motion `useInView` to trigger animated counting up for: '500+ Villas Transformed', '100% Premium Quality', 'Based in Dubai'.

components.name: ContactSection
components.instructions: Left: Form with floating labels and simulated validation/success state. Right: Dark-mode stylized map and address details.

patterns.entrance: Staggered fade in and slide up from 20px on scroll using Framer Motion.
patterns.hover_button: Scale up slightly (1.02), background color shift, text color contrast.
patterns.slider: Smooth crossfade for Hero background images (opacity 0 to 1, transition 1s).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use overlays or text-shadows if needed.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for buttons without text, such as hamburger menus or slider controls.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx file, so write components in JavaScript (.js or .jsx).
Do NOT apply universal transition (e.g. `transition: all`). Add transitions for specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container in CSS (no text-align: center on body/root).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky/floating containers.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Ensure the sticky header is never fully transparent if content scrolls under it.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (e.g., p-8 to p-16) for a premium, uncrowded feel.
Use Framer Motion for scroll entrance animations (e.g., whileInView) and 3D hover effects.
Implement Floating labels for the contact form using CSS transform and position relative/absolute logic.
